notes: Task 0097 SCOPED 2026-05-30 (orchestrator). Implementer prompt at ai/tasks/task-0097.md. Branch impl/task-0097-edge-rate-limiting. Single chokepoint extension: enforceRateLimit(request, requestId, env, ctx) in NEW apps/api-edge/src/rate-limit.ts, called from inside existing replayOrExecute() in idempotency.ts BEFORE KV cache lookup. Each facade passes a routeFamily literal. Two independent buckets: org (when org-scoped actor resolved), identity (actor or anon CF-Connecting-IP fallback). 429 if EITHER overflows. Wire shape: rate_limited envelope code (already declared in specs/contracts/api-guidelines.md line 127), Retry-After header, X-RateLimit-{Limit,Remaining,Reset}-<scope> headers on EVERY response (allowed and rejected). Backend default: token-bucket on new sibling KV namespace api_edge_rate_limit_{stage,prod} added to existing infra/terraform/cloudflare-kv/ component as cloudflare_workers_kv_namespace.api_edge_rate_limit (no new TF slice — same component just gets a sibling resource + outputs). cloudflare provider pin in cloudflare-kv stays at ~> 4.30 (NOT the cloudflare-domain ~> 4.52 pin which is frozen behind deferred 0085b). New wrangler binding RATE_LIMIT_KV under env.stage / env.prod (env.dev skipped — verify-only profile). apps/api-edge/scripts/verify-bindings.mjs extended with EXPECTED_KV entry for the new binding using same regex+sentinel pattern as IDEMPOTENCY_KV. Fail-open: backend down → admit + log via existing observability hook (matches replay-store posture). Suggested per-route-family caps (deviate with rationale): auth 10/min identity, 60/min org; org/project/config/webhooks/metering/billing 60/min identity, 300/min org. Implementer latitude (record one-line rationale): backend choice (KV vs DO vs native RateLimit binding), bucket algorithm (token bucket recommended), key encoding, refill semantics. Hard rules: no IDEMPOTENCY_KV reuse without prefix-collision proof, no facade-local rate-limit branches, no new eslint-disable / @ts-ignore / @ts-expect-error / as unknown as, no touching cloudflare-domain or ~> 4.52 pin, no IDEMPOTENCY_KV ID changes. Out of scope: per-tenant overrides, dashboard, *-dev workers, tests/api-edge lint cleanup (Task 0096f territory). Verifier acceptance: live overflow on stage (identity, org, anon-IP), under-limit + headers on prod, regression check Task 0095.1 Phase 8 case (a) on both envs.
